name: Near Miss
description: Bullets whistle past — no damage

name: Pilot Wounded
description: A bullet grazes the pilot. Accumulates: 1=no specials, 2=hand reduced to 5, 3=dead

name: Engine Damaged
description: Engine losing power. Discard 1 climb pitch card. If none, discard 1 level pitch card

name: Engine Seized
description: Engine seizes momentarily. Discard 1 Dash card. If none, discard 1 Straight card

name: Engine Fire
description: Fire in the engine bay! Discard 1 climb pitch card and 1 Dash card

name: Aileron Damaged
description: Aileron hit by fire. Discard 1 random yaw card

name: Left Aileron Jammed
description: Left aileron cables severed. Discard 1 left yaw card

name: Right Aileron Jammed
description: Right aileron cables severed. Discard 1 right yaw card

name: Rudder Damaged
description: Rudder shot through. Discard 1 straight yaw card

name: Elevator Damaged
description: Elevator controls hit. Discard 1 random pitch card

name: Elevator Jammed Up
description: Elevator locked in climb position. Discard 1 climb pitch card

name: Elevator Jammed Down
description: Elevator locked in dive position. Discard 1 dive pitch card

name: Fuselage Ripped
description: Structural damage to fuselage. Discard 1 Dash card. If none, discard 1 Straight card

name: Struts Damaged
description: Wing struts splintered. Discard 1 Slow card. If none, discard 1 Straight card

name: Engine Temperamental
description: Engine misfiring. Discard 1 random maneuver card

name: Wing Fabric Torn
description: Canvas ripped from the upper wing. Discard 1 dive pitch card. If none, discard 1 level pitch card

name: Fuel Leak
description: Fuel line punctured. Discard 1 Straight card

name: Control Lines Frayed
description: Control wires partially severed. Discard 1 random yaw card and 1 random pitch card

name: Propeller Nicked
description: Propeller blade chipped. Discard 1 Dash card

name: Tail Section Hit
description: Tail assembly damaged. Discard 1 straight yaw card and 1 random pitch card
